title: Class 377/5 First Capital Connect/Thameslink Electrostar Pack
description: Adds the Class 377/5 in First Capital Connect & Thameslink liveries to Minecraft Transit Railway!
body:
![Class 377/5 in First Capital Connect livery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f1ddcc95c0ecd78d8dce60a14073705a22215cd_0.webp)
From Bedford to Brighton, or Luton to London (Blackfriars), the First Capital Connect/Thameslink 377/5s are here!

Including 3 liveries:
- Class 377/5 First Capital Connect (Urban Lights)
- Class 377/5 Thameslink (Urban Lights)
- Class 377/5 Thameslink (New Logo, Plain Blue, w/First Class & Standard Class driving coaches available for each end, as these sets could easily be facing the wrong way thanks to the Sutton Loop)

Requires MTR4 only!
Enjoy, or reminisce about the overcrowding!

Looking for the SouthEastern 377/5s? They can be found in [this](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/southeastern-electrostar-pack) pack.
